FINDING: services/api/src/payments/charge.ts:42:BLOCKING
WHAT: Missing timeout on outbound `chargeCard` call could hang the worker thread indefinitely.
EVIDENCE: charge.ts:42
IMPACT: Payment worker can stall; queue backs up.
OPTIONS:
1. Add a 30s axios timeout.
